ops.body: Executed same-day (round 5). cc-skills half: init side effects on main as 9bbc597 (settings.json + packs.toml; no .github/ so no CI workflow, correct default), refspecs self-adopted when task 2939d87 was filed. cc-sentiment half: init via isolated shallow clone (primary is jj-colocated, tree never touched), side effects on main as d3aeaa1 (settings.json marketplace+plugin, packs.toml [packs.cc-notes], .github/workflows/cc-notes.yml reconcile); first workflow run green (no-op, run 28748200837); refspecs + push config installed in the primary via git config (config-only), cc-notes sync runs clean. Refs publish on first entity sync — none exist there yet by design.
